subtasks.description: Query budget data by product category with cost trends (period-over-period, YoY growth, variance analysis). Calculate totals, averages, and percentage distribution by category.

Analyze budget allocation results, identify underperforming and high-impact categories, detect cost trend patterns, and generate reallocation recommendations with rationale (shift amounts, target allocation percentages, expected savings/ROI).

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks required: (1) sql_gen at mid-tier because analyzing budget by product category with cost trends requires multi-column aggregations, grouping, and possibly year-over-year/period-over-period calculations across a financial dataset. (2) cross_recon at mid-tier to synthesize the budget data, identify patterns, classify categories by performance, and generate actionable reallocation recommendations—this is recommendation generation and strategic analysis, which is core cross_recon work. No policy_action is needed unless specific governance approval is required (not mentioned). Minimal decomposition: both tasks have a clear dependency chain and neither can be split further without redundancy.

output.sql: SELECT product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend, AVG(amount_usd) AS avg_spend, COUNT(event_id) AS event_count, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS total_active_seats, SUM(amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter), 0) * 100 AS pct_of_period_spend, SUM(amount_usd) - LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY fiscal_year) AS yoy_variance, CASE WHEN LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY fiscal_year) IS NOT NULL AND LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY fiscal_year) <> 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(amount_usd) - LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY fiscal_year)) / LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY fiscal_year) * 100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS yoy_growth_pct, SUM(amount_usd) - LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter) AS qoq_variance, CASE WHEN LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter) IS NOT NULL AND LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter) <> 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(amount_usd) - LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter)) / LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter) * 100, 2) ELSE NULL END AS qoq_growth_pct, AVG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_4q_avg, SUM(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product, fiscal_year) AS annual_total_by_product, SUM(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY fiscal_year) AS annual_grand_total, ROUND(SUM(amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY fiscal_year), 0) * 100, 2) AS pct_of_annual_spend FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, total_spend DESC
